pokemon:appletun.name: Appletun
pokemon:appletun.summary: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.
Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack.
